name: toolkit-local-bridge
title: Toolkit Local Bridge
version_notes: V2 native plugin/update architecture with opt-in OpenCode and AG2 local bridge setup infrastructure.

outputs.notes: Codex native plugin manifest generated from first-party module source.

project.name: Toolkit Local Bridge
project.summary: Native Codex and Claude Code plugin metadata plus opt-in local bridge setup infrastructure for OpenCode and AG2 adapter targets.

native_plugin_metadata.summary: Generated native plugin metadata for Codex and Claude Code plus optional hooks that call the shared local bridge updater.
